Simple booking process

How to reserve your date

1

Send date

Message your event date, day/night slot, and guest count.

2

Get quote

We confirm timing, rules, availability, and current price.

3

Pay advance

Reserve the farmhouse after confirming all details.

4

Enjoy

Arrive on your booked slot and enjoy the farmhouse.

📞

Bookings are almost full

Questions before booking

FAQ

Is the pool private?

Yes, this is a private farmhouse booking. Confirm pool timing and rules on WhatsApp before payment.

Are families allowed?

Yes. This farmhouse is suitable for family picnics, birthdays, BBQ gatherings, pool parties, and private events.

What is the price?

Price depends on date, day/night slot, guest count, and weekend demand. Message on WhatsApp for today’s best price.

How do I confirm booking?

After date and availability are confirmed, advance payment reserves your slot.

Ready to check availability?

Send one WhatsApp message and get Farmhouse One availability for your date.

Check My Date
